sourceNote: Curated NR2 payer reference plus New Ridge SoftDent InsCo (Sensei) and office Insurance.xlsx contacts. Not member-specific benefits. Verify eligibility via 270/271 or clearinghouse; confirm payer ID on card. SoftDent↔Tesia join applied (exact ECS/Vyne IDs). SoftDent↔Tesia join applied (exact ECS/Vyne IDs). SoftDent↔Tesia join applied (exact ECS/Vyne IDs). SoftDent↔Tesia join applied (exact ECS/Vyne IDs). SoftDent↔Tesia join applied (exact ECS/Vyne IDs). payers.name: Delta Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Largest dental network; state affiliates use different payer IDs. Code 16 often needs narrative + radiographs. Verify state-specific Delta entity on ID card. Tesia/Vyne ID 11198. Tesia/Vyne ID DELTA.
payers.eligibilityNotes: 270/271 via clearinghouse; member ID format varies by state.

payers.name: MetLife Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Office Insurance.xlsx: Metropolitan Life Insurance Company (MetLife). Eligibility (800) 638-5433; claim phone (800) 638-5433. Vyne/e-claim 65978 OR 0000E. SoftDent carrier label: METLIFE DENTAL. Tesia/Vyne ID 65978. Tesia/Vyne ID 0000E.

payers.name: Cigna Dental

payers.name: Aetna Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Medical/dental plan crossover on appliances; keep narratives clinical not cosmetic. Tesia/Vyne ID 60054.

payers.name: UnitedHealthcare Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Use payer ID 52133 for DBP; UMR uses separate ID. 270/271 service type 35 for dental. Tesia/Vyne ID 52133.

payers.name: Guardian Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Strong on frequency limits for prophy/BWX; document perio charting when billing SRP same visit. Tesia/Vyne ID 64246.

payers.name: Humana Dental

payers.name: Anthem Blue Cross Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: State BCBS affiliate routing; check claims address on card. Tesia/Vyne ID 84105.

payers.name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Michigan Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Michigan-specific fee schedules; narrative for major services. Tesia/Vyne ID 00210. Tesia/Vyne ID BBMDQ.

payers.narrativeNotes: Verify HMO vs PPO on card before appeal language. Tesia/Vyne ID 84980.

payers.name: Ameritas Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Network vs out-of-network benefits differ; cite OON rules when applicable. Tesia/Vyne ID 47009.

payers.name: Principal Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Employer-group heavy; eligibility drives annual max remaining. Tesia/Vyne ID 61271.

payers.name: Sun Life Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Canadian/US employer plans; confirm US routing. Tesia/Vyne ID 70408.

payers.name: Lincoln Financial Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Narrative for major services; watch waiting periods on basic/major. Tesia/Vyne ID 52148.

payers.name: Unum Dental / AlwaysCare
payers.narrativeNotes: Administered benefits; card may show TPA name not Unum. Tesia/Vyne ID STR01.

payers.name: DentaQuest

payers.name: Liberty Dental Plan
payers.narrativeNotes: Medicaid-focused; frequency and prior auth rules vary by state contract. Tesia/Vyne ID 52147.

payers.name: MCNA Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: State Medicaid dental administrator; use state portal for PA status. Tesia/Vyne ID 65030.

payers.name: Envolve Dental / Ambetter Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Marketplace/Medicaid mix; verify active coverage every visit. Tesia/Vyne ID 68069.

payers.name: Careington / Discount Plans
payers.narrativeNotes: Discount plan not insurance — do not draft insurance appeal narratives; patient pays contracted fee.

payers.name: DenteMax Network
payers.narrativeNotes: Network leasing; claims go to primary payer on card, not DenteMax.

payers.name: AARP Dental Insurance (Delta)

payers.name: Delta Dental of Pennsylvania
payers.narrativeNotes: Common in mid-Atlantic employer market. Tesia/Vyne ID 23166.

payers.name: Premera Blue Cross Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Pacific Northwest; medical/dental plan separation important for appliances.

payers.name: Kaiser Permanente Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: HMO capitation model in some regions; referrals may apply.

payers.name: SKYGEN / Scion Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Third-party administrator; card shows underlying payer — bill correct entity. Tesia/Vyne ID SCION.

payers.name: Healthplex / EmblemHealth Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: NY metro; verify Emblem vs Healthplex routing on card.

payers.name: State Medicaid Dental (generic)
payers.narrativeNotes: State-specific rules; prior auth, age limits, and CDT coverage vary. Never assume commercial rules.

payers.name: Medicare Advantage Dental Rider
payers.narrativeNotes: Supplemental dental only; low annual max common. Medical plan handles TMJ differently. Tesia/Vyne ID MA001.

payers.name: TRICARE Dental (United Concordia)
payers.narrativeNotes: Active duty family plans; follow TRICARE frequency tables. Tesia/Vyne ID 99726. Tesia/Vyne ID 0000D.

payers.name: FEP BlueDental
payers.narrativeNotes: Federal employees; narrative for crowns/endo with chart docs.

payers.name: Teamsters / Union Dental Trusts

payers.name: Argus Dental Vision
payers.narrativeNotes: Bundled dental/vision admin; confirm dental routing.

payers.name: Avesis Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Vision/dental admin; Medicaid and commercial mix.

payers.name: Dental Select
payers.narrativeNotes: Regional PPO; eligibility before major treatment plan. Tesia/Vyne ID DSEL1.

payers.name: Renaissance Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Humana affiliate in some markets; verify legal entity on 271. Tesia/Vyne ID RLHA1.

payers.name: Solstice Benefits Dental

payers.name: Meritain Health Dental

payers.name: Local Union / Taft-Hartley Dental
payers.narrativeNotes: Plan booklet governs; narrative should cite trust plan section when appealing.

payers.name: Self-Pay / No Insurance
